## Checklist

- [ ] `dotnet build` succeeds without warnings
- [ ] `dotnet test` passes (all existing + any new tests)
- [ ] New scraper includes a fixture file and test class
- [ ] No secrets committed (API keys, passwords, `.env` files)
- [ ] Documentation updated if behavior changed (README, appsettings, etc.)
